steps.action: Ghoomar or ghumar is a traditional folk dance of with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Ghoomar or ghumar is a traditional folk dance of with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: It was the Bhil tribe who performed it to worshi
steps.text: It was the Bhil tribe who performed it to worship Goddess Saraswati which was later embraced by Rajputs.

steps.action: The dance is chiefly performed by veiled women w
steps.text: The dance is chiefly performed by veiled women who wear flowing dresses called ghaghara.

steps.action: The dance typically involves performers pirouett
steps.text: The dance typically involves performers pirouetting while moving in and out of a wide circle.

steps.action: The word ghoomna describes the twirling movement
steps.text: The word ghoomna describes the twirling movement of the dancers and is the basis of the word ghoomar.

steps.action: According to the traditional rituals, newly marr
steps.text: According to the traditional rituals, newly married bride is expected to dance ghoomar on being welcomed to her new marital home.

steps.action: Ghoomar is often performed on special occasions,
steps.text: Ghoomar is often performed on special occasions, such as at weddings, festivals and religious occasions, which sometimes lasts for hours.

steps.action: Ghoomar was performed at Rajputana by local wome
steps.text: Ghoomar was performed at Rajputana by local women, later on Rajput elite women also started participating in the dance.

steps.action: Men were not allowed at these dance performances
steps.text: Men were not allowed at these dance performances.

steps.action: Ghoomar became popular in the Indian state of Ra
steps.text: Ghoomar became popular in the Indian state of Rajasthan during the reigns of Rajput kings, and is typically performed by women during auspicious occasions.

steps.action: The dance form acquires different style and slig
steps.text: The dance form acquires different style and slight change in attire with the different regions of Rajasthan.

steps.action: The 2017 Bollywood film Padmaavat featured a pop
steps.text: The 2017 Bollywood film Padmaavat featured a popular song titled "Ghoomar" that showcased this traditional folk dance.

steps.action: Bheels were a strong community at that time and
steps.text: Bheels were a strong community at that time and were in constant war with Rajput kings.

steps.action: After much fighting peace was made and they bega
steps.text: After much fighting peace was made and they began interacting with each other.

steps.action: Women perform ghoomar with ghoonghat on their he
steps.text: Women perform ghoomar with ghoonghat on their head covering their face.

steps.action: Songs might be centered on royal legends or thei
steps.text: Songs might be centered on royal legends or their traditions.

steps.action: The Government of India awarded her the fourth h
steps.text: The Government of India awarded her the fourth highest civilian honour of the Padma Shri, in 2007, for her contributions to arts.
